idea: isekai, simple or near useless skill with overpowered compounding skill increase, easy-medium difficulty, keep an edge, not too hard
want: Original isekai, weak seed + compound, fair edge, NOT harem/lovey/free-OP MC

fields.custom_skills: Weak Observation, Skill Compounding, Training Limit, Endless Growth, Resource Management, Enemy Awareness, Progress Pressure
fields.npc_stat_scaling: mostly weaker early, relative ranks later
fields.custom_style: Isekai coastal fantasy with a readable system UI when game_system is on. Measured hope, fair pressure, no auto-win.
fields.start_location: Coastal village with a hidden guild library
fields.character_backstory: Born in a coastal village where the guild library hid ancient knowledge, they lived a quiet life as a bookkeeper, content with routine and small rewards. A mysterious accident left them with a weak Observation skill, barely enough to notice patterns, but the system hints at compounding potential. They remember little of their former life, only a vague sense of unfinished tasks and a lingering fear of being overlooked.
fields.death_rules: Skill progress visible to enemies, but no instant death from injuries
fields.loot_rarity: Common items frequent, rare items occasional, enchanted items rare, unique items very rare, legendary items mythical

intent.edge: Weakness: Skill progress is visible to enemies

power_fantasy.skill_summary: Skill gains stack multiplicatively over time

intent.dm_stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance
intent.style_notes: Focus on skill progression and strategic use of compounding
intent.raw_idea: isekai, simple or near useless skill with overpowered compounding skill increase, easy-medium difficulty, keep an edge, not too hard

session_theme.dm_stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance

power_fantasy.skill_summary: Skill gains stack multiplicatively over time

session_theme.edge: Weakness: Skill progress is visible to enemies
session_theme.style_notes: Focus on skill progression and strategic use of compounding

field_overrides.custom_skills: Start with almost no useful skills; weak seed skill: Observation (near-useless F rank). It may compound through repeated use, training, and risky practice.
field_overrides.npc_stat_scaling: mostly weaker early, relative ranks later
field_overrides.custom_style: Isekai RPG lean: status/skill progression may be diegetic when the system UI is on. A readable game-system window can appear in-world without breaking immersion. Power fantasy: start weak, growth compounds through play, never auto-win. DM stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance Focus on skill progression and strategic use of compounding

idea: I wake in a rationed harbor city after dying at a desk job. No destiny, no harem. Work, debt, and a nearly useless filing habit that only compounds if I risk real mistakes. Hard but fair, lasting injuries, scarce loot.

fields.custom_skills: filing habits, compounding mistakes, risk of real-world consequences, grind-driven skill refinement, debt accumulation through errors, survival through precision, lasting injuries from negligence
fields.custom_style: Dystopian Office Hellscape with grind-driven despair, no auto-win, and lasting injuries. Systemic pressure and consequence-driven choices
fields.character_backstory: Born into a family of bureaucrats in the Rationed Harbor City, they spent their life in a monotonous desk job, accumulating debt and enduring systemic pressure. After a fatal mistake at work, they were reborn into the same city's filing system, starting with a near-useless Observation skill that can compound through repeated use and risky practice. Their survival now hinges on refining their filing habits while avoiding real-world consequences.
fields.game_system: System RPG with grind-driven skill refinement and consequence-driven choices

intent.edge: Every mistake compounds into lasting injuries and debt

power_fantasy.skill_summary: Filing habits can be refined into precision but risk real-world consequences

intent.dm_stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance
intent.style_notes: Focus on systemic pressure and consequence-driven choices

idea: gentle pastoral mystery around a river village; soft danger, community ties, easy difficulty, no game system windows, no power fantasy

fields.world_style: Whimsical pastoral mystery with soft danger
fields.custom_style: A soft, translucent system window blends into the pastoral landscape, revealing clues about the village's secrets without disrupting the eerie atmosphere.
character_backstory: Raised in the mist-shrouded village of Lirath, the protagonist spent their childhood helping their father tend the family orchard and mending fences along the riverbank.
Their life changed when a storm unearthed the ancient willow at the edge of the woods, its roots pulsing with a faint, silver light that only they could see.
Drawn by the willow’s whispers, they returned to the tree to investigate, unaware it had marked them as the heir to a forgotten pact between the village and the spirit realm.
fields.custom_skills: soft investigation, gentle persuasion, community trust, hidden secrets, pastoral awareness, river village lore, system whispers, soft danger awareness
fields.faction_pressure: Community disputes over river access and ancestral land claims
fields.system_style: A soft, translucent system window blends into the pastoral landscape, revealing clues about the village's secrets without disrupting the eerie atmosphere.
fields.death_rules: Death is a rare occurrence, typically resulting from severe neglect of community bonds or exposure to the willow's hidden dangers.
fields.loot_rarity: Mundane items frequent, rare items occasional, enchanted items rare, unique items very rare, legendary items never

intent.edge: Community bonds tested by hidden secrets

power_fantasy.skill_summary: Optional: basic investigation and persuasion skills

intent.dm_stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance
intent.style_notes: Focus on atmosphere and character relationships

idea: system apocalypse: status windows after the sky broke, hard difficulty, training-heavy skills, no free power spikes, political scavenger factions
want: System RPG without OP turbo start

fields.custom_skills: status window manipulation, compounding skill training, faction reputation growth, resource scarcity management, system skill discovery delay, survival skill compounding, hard combat skill growth
fields.custom_style: System Apocalypse: Status Windows in a bleak, survival-driven world where player agency and systemic challenges define progression.
fields.character_backstory: Born in a crumbling city-state, they were a low-level bureaucrat tasked with maintaining the failing status windows that tracked survival metrics. Before the apocalypse, they lived a mundane life, struggling with debt and family obligations. The collapse of the sky left them stranded in the Shattered Spire, with no skills to survive. They remember little of their former life, only fragmented memories of a world that no longer exists.
fields.death_rules: Status window collapse triggers permanent skill loss and faction exile
fields.loot_rarity: scarce, with rare drops only during faction quests

power_fantasy.skill_summary: Survival, combat, and diplomacy skills require rigorous training

intent.dm_stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance
intent.style_notes: Focus on systemic challenges and player-driven progression

idea: wuxia sect politics and face culture; cultivation is slow and costly; normal difficulty; reputation and debts matter more than levels

fields.world_style: Sect Politics and Face Culture in Wuxia
fields.custom_style: Wuxia sect politics with face culture as currency; reputation and debts shape alliances; cultivation is slow and resource-dependent; no auto-win, fair player agency
fields.start_location: The Dusty Hall of Mutual Debts
fields.character_backstory: Born into a minor sect in the Northern Wastes, I spent my youth managing debts and cultivating in secret. My family's reputation was tarnished by a failed alliance, leaving us in the Dusty Hall of Mutual Debts. Now, I navigate sect politics with a pragmatic eye, seeking to rebuild my standing without falling into the same traps.
fields.custom_skills: Face Currency Management, Debt Negotiation, Sect Politics, Reputation Control, Resource Allocation, Moral Dilemma Resolution, Faction Loyalty Management, Cultivation Cost Optimization
fields.faction_pressure: sect politics and face culture dominance
fields.death_rules: Death is a debt to the sect; dying without repaying your face or debts erases your reputation and forces you into the Dusty Hall of Mutual Debts.
fields.loot_rarity: Mundane items frequent, rare items rare, enchanted items occasional, unique items rare, legendary items almost never

intent.genre: Wuxia Sect Politics and Face Culture
intent.edge: Reputation and debts constrain choices; face is currency

power_fantasy.skill_summary: Cultivation is slow, resources are scarce

intent.dm_stance: always keep fair DM player-agency stance
intent.style_notes: Focus on social dynamics and consequences
